programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: . TRT World brings the latest news from around the globe, when it happens.

programme.title: Newsfeed
programme.desc: . Newsfeed reflects the day`s events and opinions,as reported or discussed on social media.

programme.title: Roundtable
programme.desc: . Ideas are changing our world. See them discussed and dissected, every weekday.

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: . TRT World brings the latest news from around the globe, when it happens.

programme.title: Beyond The Game
programme.desc: . Beyond the Game has the stories behind the action. We’ll be at the biggest events, talking to the biggest names. If sport is your passion, this is your show.

programme.title: Storyteller
programme.desc: Greenlandic geologist Minik Rosing leads a global team exploring how nutrient-rich glacial mud could transform poor tropical soils and reduce global inequality.

programme.desc: . TRT World brings the latest news from around the globe, when it happens.

programme.title: Strait Talk
programme.desc: . An inside look at the players and policymakers who are shaping the world we live in. To give you a unique perspective on global events.

programme.title: Business News
programme.desc: . As the world grapples with ever changing politics and crises, economy is always center stage. TRT World’s Business News gives you the insight.

programme.title: The Newsmakers
programme.desc: . With in-depth reports and strong, unfiltered debates - The Newsmakers examine the people and the stories that are shaping our lives.

programme.title: Just 2 Degrees
